title: Principal Instructional Designer at MBD Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at MBD Group
jsonLd.description:
MBD Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MBD Group:
MBD Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group!
